description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to master or dev branches and on pull requests to those branches, but only for files in src/ and .gitmodules. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up MSBuild and .NET Core 3.1.301, restores dependencies, builds Impostor.Client and Impostor.Server, and runs tests. The deploy job runs on windows-latest, depends on the build job, and only runs on release events. It publishes Impostor.Server for win-x64 and linux-x64.
